docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY NADELL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAJJAR, BRUCE AND DBA-HOLLYWOOD BOBBERS OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-16-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAJJAR, BRUCE AND DBA-HOLLYWOOD BOBBERS OF S.F.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NADELL, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAJJAR, BRUCE AND DBA-HOLLYWOOD BOBBERS OF S.F. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: S. VANTREE NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
